2134510.name: Promethean Hive Wave Defense
2134510.description: Follows the template of most wave defense game, where you will have a prep phase in between waves. the waves will get harder as you progress. you can prepare defenses around the map to slow down the enemies or block off certain areas. You will be required to move from defensive position to defensive position to stand a better chance. you are given the skills to engineer your own weapon and tweak the capabilities. you will have to balance your weapon choice for the location and enemy while also not negatively affecting the team by harming them or wasting resources. you will have the ability to build a wide range of team makeups where all members have unique weaponry purpose and functionality.
2134510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
